creator: karl@denninger.net
text:
One interesting note.

While this is entirely-different hardware a Pi3 running 13.1 does NOT have this problem on its ue0 interface.  Its kernel, however, is older:

FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n250683-e44e611e31c: Fri May  6 10:47:17 EDT 2022     karl@NewFS.denninger.net:/work/OBJ/ARM64-13/obj/work/CrossBuild-13.1STABLE/arm64.aarch64/sys/GENERIC

ZERO resets on its ue0 interface, its been up for 133 days and is on the same Gigabit switch as the pcEngines machine noted above.
